<title>America's #1 Outdoor Recreation Company - Wheel Fun Rentals</title>
<meta name="description" content="Having been in the outdoor recreational rental company since 1999, Wheel Fun Rentals operates over 100 locations throughout the United States that rent bikes and watercraft. They serve over 2.5 million guests annually and have been recognized as "#1 in Recreation by Entrepreneur Magazine, 3 years in a row." />

yoast_head_json.title: America's #1 Outdoor Recreation Company - Wheel Fun Rentals
yoast_head_json.description: Having been in the outdoor recreational rental company since 1999, Wheel Fun Rentals operates over 100 locations throughout the United States that rent bikes and watercraft. They serve over 2.5 million guests annually and have been recognized as "#1 in Recreation by Entrepreneur Magazine, 3 years in a row.
